title: Candidate Loyalty Scoring Tools: 2026 Platform Comparison
description: Comprehensive review of 2026 Candidate Loyalty Scoring Tools, including features, pricing, and platform comparisons. Helping staffing agencies score candidate loyalty.
content:
Candidate Loyalty Scoring Overview

Loyalty scoring is an important component of staffing agency retention prediction. Staffing agencies need to score candidate loyalty including loyalty prediction, retention probability, engagement scoring. Candidate loyalty scoring tools help agencies achieve loyalty scoring, retention prediction, engagement analysis.

The core value of loyalty scoring tools lies in improving scoring efficiency by 60%, enhancing prediction accuracy by 70%, optimizing engagement analysis by 50%. According to industry research, staffing agencies adopting loyalty scoring tools average scoring time shortened by 40%, prediction accuracy improved by 35%, engagement analysis efficiency improved by 30%.

Loyalty Scoring Platform Reviews

Pymetrics Loyalty Scoring

Pymetrics provides cognitive-based loyalty scoring. Loyalty scoring features score candidate loyalty. Retention prediction features predict retention probability. Engagement analysis features analyze engagement patterns.

Pricing per assessment 50-100 USD. Customer feedback notes cognitive scoring scientific, loyalty prediction accurate.

Selection Recommendations

Staffing agencies selecting candidate loyalty scoring tools should focus on: loyalty scoring scores candidate loyalty; retention prediction predicts retention probability; engagement analysis analyzes engagement patterns; cost structure matches agency scoring volume.
author: Loyalty Scoring Research Institute
